query:
-- Create test user for production authentication testing
INSERT INTO users (email, name, passwordHash, role, authenticationProvider, loginMethod, isActive, emailVerified, emailVerifiedAt, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES (
  'prod-test@example.com',
  'Production Test User',
  '$2a$10$N9qo8uLOickgx2ZMRZoMyeIjZAgcg7b3XeKeUxWdeS86E36P4/KFm', -- bcrypt hash of 'TestPassword123!'
  'user',
  'local',
  'email',
  1,
  1,
  NOW(),
  NOW(),
  NOW()
);

-- Verify user was created
SELECT id, email, name, role, emailVerified FROM users WHERE email = 'prod-test@example.com';
